items.title: D.O.A.
items.summary: Dexter Cornell, an English Professor becomes embroiled in a series of murders involving people around him. Dexter has good reason to want to find the murderer but hasn't much time. He finds help and comfort from one of his student, Sydney Fuller.

infolabels.title: D.O.A.
infolabels.plot: Dexter Cornell, an English Professor becomes embroiled in a series of murders involving people around him. Dexter has good reason to want to find the murderer but hasn't much time. He finds help and comfort from one of his student, Sydney Fuller.

items.title: Forced Landing
items.summary: In this high-flying mystery set aboard a cross-country flight to New York, some of the passengers are kidnappers who are trying to locate a hidden cache of loot. Unfortunately, something goes wrong during the trip and the pilots must land the plane in the Arizona desert during a terrible storm. There all of the passengers and crew find cramped accommodations in a lonely farmhouse where murder, mystery and mayhem occur.

items.title: Green Eyes
items.summary: The owner of a large mansion in the country throws a costume party for some of his friends. However, the party turns sour when he is found stabbed to death in a closet. The police and a guest try to discover who committed the murder.

infolabels.title: Green Eyes

items.title: The King Murder
items.summary: A beautiful blonde makes a career out of seducing and then blackmailing wealthy married men. She is found murdered after demanding a $5000 payoff from her latest victim, and the detective investigating the case finds out that she was involved in a lot more than just blackmail.

items.title: The Man Who Knew Too Much
items.summary: While vacationing in St. Moritz, a British couple receive a clue to an imminent assassination attempt, only to learn that their daughter has been kidnapped to keep them quiet.

infolabels.title: The Man Who Knew Too Much
infolabels.plot: While vacationing in St. Moritz, a British couple receive a clue to an imminent assassination attempt, only to learn that their daughter has been kidnapped to keep them quiet.

source.archive_title: The Man Who Knew Too Much (1934)

archive_file.file: Peter Lorre in Alfred Hitchcock's 1934  The Man Who Knew Too Much  .. a special favourite.ia.mp4

items.title: Mr. Wong in Chinatown
items.summary: A pretty Chinese woman, seeking help from San Francisco detective James Lee Wong, is killed by a poisoned dart in his front hall, having time only to scrawl "Captain J" on a sheet of paper. She proves to be Princess Lin Hwa, on a secret military mission for Chinese forces fighting the Japanese invasion. Mr. Wong finds two captains with the intial J in the case, neither being quite what he seems; there's fog on the waterfront and someone still has that poison-dart gun...

items.title: The Scarlet Clue
items.summary: Chinese sleuth Charlie Chan discovers a scheme for the theft of government radar plans while investigating several murders.

infolabels.title: The Scarlet Clue
infolabels.plot: Chinese sleuth Charlie Chan discovers a scheme for the theft of government radar plans while investigating several murders.

items.title: Secret Agent
items.summary: During World War I, a novelist declared dead is recruited by British intelligence and sent to Switzerland under a new identity to assassinate a German spy. Teamed with a fellow agent posing as his wife and an eccentric assassin known as “the General,” the trio close in on their target — until two of them grow ambivalent when their duty to the mission clashes with their consciences.

items.title: The Spanish Cape Mystery
items.summary: Ellery Queen's vacation is interrupted when murder strikes next door to his oceanside cabin.

infolabels.title: The Spanish Cape Mystery
infolabels.plot: Ellery Queen's vacation is interrupted when murder strikes next door to his oceanside cabin.

items.title: The Third Man
items.summary: In postwar Vienna, Austria, Holly Martins, a writer of pulp Westerns, arrives penniless as a guest of his childhood chum Harry Lime, only to learn he has died. Martins develops a conspiracy theory after learning of a "third man" present at the time of Harry's death, running into interference from British officer Major Calloway, and falling head-over-heels for Harry's grief-stricken lover, Anna.

items.title: The Thirteenth Guest
items.summary: Thirteen years after a dinner party in which the thirteenth guest failed to arrive, the remaining guests are being murdered one by one, and their bodies being placed at the same dinner table in the appropriate seats they occupied thirteen years prior.
